name: Raduak
description_en: Raduak was a distant cousin to Tyari (a cousin of a cousin) who knew them since for 10 years. It was his reading of the stars that helped Tyari realize what their future has in store. Later on they would meet again with Emir and Haley during the climb on top of Mount Targon.
description_fr: Raduak était un cousin éloigné de Tyari (un cousin d'un cousin) qui les connaissait depuis 10 ans. C’est sa lecture des étoiles qui a aidé Tyari à comprendre ce que leur avenir leur réservait. Plus tard, ils retrouveraient Emir et Haley lors de l'ascension du mont Targon.
